files.patch:
@@ -8,31 +8,34 @@ on:
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
-  macos-swift:
+  desktop-swift:
     name: Desktop Swift (${{ matrix.os }})
     # Swift 6.2.1 still crashes (SwiftTesting on Linux) and exits 1 on Windows after the test runner finishes.
     # Keep those legs running for signal, but don't fail the workflow until the upstream toolchain is fixed.
-    runs-on: macos-15
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.allow_failure }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: macos-15
+            allow_failure: false
+          - os: ubuntu-22.04
+            allow_failure: true
+          - os: windows-2025
+            allow_failure: true
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Select Xcode 16
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
         run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.1.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
 
-      - name: Install Swift toolchain (macOS/Linux)
-        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
-        uses: SwiftyLab/setup-swift@v1
+      - name: Setup Swift 6.2.1
+        uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v2
         with:
           swift-version: '6.2.1'
 
-      - name: Install Swift toolchain (Windows)
-        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
-        uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v0.3.0
-        with:
-          branch: swift-6.2-release
-          tag: 6.2-RELEASE
-
       - name: Build
         run: swift build --build-tests
